title: Nature of a contract
learningObjectives: Define a contract and its essential features.
Evaluate freedom of contract and social policy limits.

simpleExplanation.title: What makes a binding deal
simpleExplanation.summary: A contract is a legally enforceable agreement — usually bilateral (both promise) or unilateral (one promises for an act).

sections.content: **Nature of a contract** (3.1.1) opens Paper 3. State **four formation elements** before terms/discharge.

sections.label: Mark a nature of contract question
